description.value:
Frequency once per day

You Step and create a burst of brilliant, scintillating light in a @Template[type:burst|distance:5] centered on one corner of your previous space. Other creatures in the area must attempt a @Check[fortitude|against:class-spell|options:inflicts:blinded,inflicts:dazzled] save against the higher of your class DC or spell DC. On a failure, a creature is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.Blinded] and @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.Dazzled] for 1 round. On a critical failure, they're blinded for 2 rounds and dazzled for 1 minute.
